frozen_rule: highest exact strict-correct count over all 212 mirrored cells among the four roster judges; ties by main-82 count, then lower frozen input+output price sum, then lexicographic model id (phase2_protocol.json decisions.capability_measurement.anchor_selection)
selection_basis: mechanical application of the frozen rule; no tie-break needed (206 strictly highest among roster judges)

sensitivity_disclosure.finding: all 57 of Llama-3.3-70B's strict INVALIDs are the literal form 'ANSWER: X.' (a trailing period mirroring the prompt's own sentence punctuation); under the tolerant parse Llama scores 209/212, the highest of all five models, and the anchor winner CHANGES
